about.subtitle: Operational Response & Incident System
about.platformDescription: ORIS is a collaborative security incident response platform. It enables case management, team coordination and investigation documentation.

apiDocs.title: API Documentation
apiDocs.subtitle: Technical reference for integration and automation
apiDocs.authDesc: All requests must include a JWT token in the Authorization header.
apiDocs.baseUrlDesc: The API is accessible via the /api prefix. In production behind a reverse proxy, use the absolute path.

cases.supervisionDesc: Cases where you are not an investigator
cases.noCaseDesc: Start by creating your first investigation case
cases.author: Author

editCase.title: Edit case
editCase.caseTitlePlaceholder: E.g.: Security incident detected on server X

closeCase.title: Close case
closeCase.warning: Warning: Closing a case is a definitive action. The file will become read-only and can no longer be modified.
closeCase.summaryPlaceholder: Write a complete case review: actions taken, results obtained, conclusions...
closeCase.summaryHint: This summary will be visible in the closed case history.

admin.title: User management
admin.subtitle: Manage accounts and permissions
admin.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
admin.allowApiTokensDesc: Permit users to generate access tokens for automation.
admin.cannotRemoveOwnAdmin: You cannot remove your own administrator role
admin.cannotDeactivateSelf: You cannot deactivate your own account
admin.debugDesc: Shows the Investigation section in the sidebar.
admin.confirmDeleteBeneficiary: Are you sure you want to delete this beneficiary?
admin.selectBeneficiaryDesc: Choose a beneficiary from the list to manage its members.
admin.sessionLockDesc: Automatically lock the session after a period of inactivity.

apiTokens.title: API Tokens
apiTokens.subtitle: Manage your personal API access tokens.
apiTokens.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this token? Any application using it will lose access.
apiTokens.generatedWarning: Copy this token now. For your security, it will never be shown again.

pin.title: Session Lock PIN
pin.subtitle: Quickly unlock your session with a PIN code.
pin.label: PIN code (4-6 digits)
pin.confirmRemove: Enter your password to remove the PIN:

tasks.myTasksDesc: Tasks assigned to me and unassigned tasks from my cases
tasks.noAssignedDesc: No tasks are currently assigned to you.
tasks.noUnassignedDesc: All tasks in your cases are assigned.

taskModal.investigationTaskDesc: Link this task to a system to track its investigation
taskModal.malwareAnalysisTaskDesc: Link this task to a malware or tool to track its analysis
taskModal.osintTaskDesc: Open source intelligence research related to this case
taskModal.title: Title

closeTask.title: Close task
closeTask.warning: Warning: The task will become read-only. The case Team Leader can reopen it if necessary.
closeTask.selectInvestigationStatus: You must select an investigation status for this system
closeTask.commentPlaceholder: Write a task summary: results obtained, conclusions...
closeTask.commentHint: This comment will be visible in the closed task details.
closeTask.statusCleanDesc: The system is clean, no signs of compromise
closeTask.statusCompromisedDesc: The system was accessed or compromised by the attacker
closeTask.statusInfectedDesc: The system is infected (malware, backdoor, etc.)
closeTask.statusCleanInitialDesc: The system appears clean before investigation

diamond.title: Diamond Model
diamond.killChainMatrixDesc: Kill Chain matrix — systems in columns, phases in rows
diamond.clickToSelect: Click on a diamond to view and edit its axes
diamond.noEventsWithPhase: No events with an assigned kill chain phase.

reporting.dailyActivityDesc: Event distribution by day — identifying preferred activity days
reporting.attackerUtcDesc: Adjust to identify the attacker's probable timezone
reporting.accessDenied: Access denied: you do not have rights to modify this case.
reporting.hoursDisplayed: Displayed hours correspond to {{offset}} (attacker's point of view)

taskDetails.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this task?
taskDetails.reopenConfirm: The task will be reopened and the closure comment will be deleted. You can close it again later with a new comment.
taskDetails.editClosureNote: The modification will be tracked with your name and date.

taskComments.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this comment?

taskFiles.dragDrop: Drag your files here or click to browse

taskObjects.noObjects: No objects linked to this task
taskObjects.noObjectsHint: Add key events to link objects
taskObjects.networkIndicatorRequired: At least one indicator (IP, domain or URL) is required
taskObjects.invalidSize: Size must be a valid number

caseDetails.restrictedDesc: You are not assigned to this case. Only the Team Leader and team members can see the details.
caseDetails.reassignWarning: The current Team Leader will lose control of the case. This action should only be used when necessary.
caseDetails.reopenConfirm: The case will be reopened and the closure summary will be deleted. The Team Leader can re-close it later with a new summary.
caseDetails.comingSoon: This section will be available soon

auto.affiche_la_section_investigati: Display the Investigation section in the cases sidebar
auto.applique_aux_nouveaux_cases_cr: Applies to newly created cases. Existing cases are not affected.
auto.vous_n_etes_pas_assigne_a_ce_c: You are not assigned to this case. Only the Team Leader and team members can see the details.
auto.cette_section_sera_disponible_: This section will be available soon
auto.le_mot_de_passe_doit_contenir_au_moi: Password must be at least 6 characters long
auto.un_administrateur_existe_d_j_dans_le: An administrator already exists in the system.
auto.simple_classique_et_historique_id_al: Simple, classic, and historic. Ideal to popularize traditional attacks (7 main phases).
auto.marge_de_man_uvre_limit_e_pour_les_m: Limited flexibility for insider threats or complex cloud-native compromises.
auto.extr_mement_exhaustif_fusionne_les_m: Extremely comprehensive. Merges models to cover the full lifecycle (Pre/In/Post) in 18 phases.
auto.peut_devenir_lourd_et_complexe_pour_: Can become heavy and complex for small analyses or lean teams.
auto.le_standard_absolu_des_soc_et_edr_ac: The absolute standard for modern SOCs and EDRs. Great integration with CTI via tactics/techniques.
auto.tr_s_vaste_sa_granularit_asym_trique: Very broad. Its asymmetric granularity sometimes drowns the overall macroscopic temporal readability.
auto.un_compte_administrateur_exist: An administrator account already exists for this instance
auto.s_lectionnez_le_mod_le_de_mod_lisati: Select the attack modeling framework (Kill Chain) that will be used by default in your investigations. This choice can be changed later in the Administration section.
auto.beneficiaire_obligatoire: The first beneficiary is mandatory to start using the application.
auto.cr_ation_du_compte_administrat: Creation of the first system administrator account.
auto.le_case_sera_rouvert_et_la_syn: The case will be reopened and the closure summary will be deleted. The Team Leader will be able to close it again later with a new summary.
auto.le_team_leader_actuel_perdra_l: The current Team Leader will lose control of the case. This action should only be used when necessary.
auto.la_tache_passera_en_lecture_se: The task will become read-only. The case Team Leader will be able to reopen it if necessary.
auto.ce_commentaire_sera_visible_da: This comment will be visible in the details of the closed task.
auto.redigez_un_bilan_de_la_tache_r: Write a summary of the task: results obtained, conclusions...
auto.taches_qui_me_sont_affectees_e: Tasks assigned to me and unassigned tasks from my cases
auto.la_tache_sera_rouverte_et_le_c: The task will be reopened and the closure comment will be deleted. You will be able to close it later with a new comment.
auto.la_modification_sera_tracee_av: The modification will be tracked with your name and date.
auto.glissez_vos_fichiers_ici_ou_cl: Drag your files here or click to browse
auto.tache_d_investigation_liee_au_: Investigation task linked to the system
auto.lier_cette_tache_a_un_systeme_: Link this task to a system to track its investigation
auto.lier_cette_tache_a_un_malware_: Link this task to a malware or tool to track its analysis
auto.recherche_en_sources_ouvertes_: Open source intelligence (OSINT) research related to this case
auto.aucun_objet_lie_a_cette_tache: No object linked to this task
auto.ajoutez_des_faits_marquants_po: Add key events to link objects
auto.le_mot_de_passe_doit_contenir_: Password must contain at least 6 characters
auto.aucun_evenement_dans_le_modele: No event in the Diamond model
auto.sur_la_duree_de_l_incident_les: over the duration of the incident. The
auto.revelent_des_silences_suspects: reveal suspicious silence and the systems
auto.n_ont_aucun_systeme_source_dan: have no source system in the Infrastructure axis — a malware or a C2 are activity indicators, not access vectors.
auto.aucun_evenement_dans_la_timeli: No event in the timeline. Add events to build the Activity Thread.
auto.cliquer_sur_un_noeud_pour_voir: Click on a node to see details
auto.liez_des_systemes_malwares_com: Link systems, malwares, accounts, indicators, or exfiltrations to populate the Diamond model automatically.
auto.il_est_recommande_de_lancer_un: It is recommended to launch an investigation from the Systems page.
auto.aucun_systeme_enregistre_dans_: No system registered in this case.
auto.chaque_systeme_est_croise_avec: Each system is cross-referenced with the 4 axes of the Diamond model and the presence of a
auto.systeme_source_dans_l_axe_infr: source system in the Infrastructure axis
auto.seul_indicateur_d_un_vecteur_l: (sole indicator of a documented lateral vector). An identified malware or C2
auto.ce_sont_des_indicateurs_d_acti: — these are post-access activity indicators. Systems without a source system (empty blue column) constitute the
auto.systeme_source_absent_vecteur_: Source system absent — lateral vector unknown
auto.aucun_evenement_avec_une_phase: No event with an assigned Kill Chain phase.
auto.matrice_kill_chain_systemes_en: Kill Chain Matrix — systems in columns, phases in rows
auto.cliquez_sur_un_diamant_pour_vo: Click on a diamond to view and edit its axes
auto.au_moins_un_des_champs_ip_doma: At least one of the IP, Domain, or URL fields is required.
auto.contexte_et_details_de_l_indic: Context and details of the indicator...
auto.dans_l_axe_infrastructure_et_l: in the Infrastructure axis and the
auto.systemes_victimes_dont_aucun_e: — victim systems where no incoming event documents the lateral vector. An identified malware or C2 does not constitute a source of compromise, but post-access activity indicators.
auto.ces_systemes_figurent_dans_l_a: These systems appear in the Infrastructure axis (source of lateral movement) without any incoming event documenting how they were themselves compromised. Their initial access remains unknown.
auto.ces_systemes_sont_victimes_d_e: These systems are victims of events without any source system (Infrastructure axis) being documented. The lateral vector is unknown. The presence of a malware or a C2 does not imply that the source is identified.
auto.tous_les_systemes_victimes_ont: All victim systems have at least one source system documented in the Infrastructure axis.
auto.aucun_systeme_identifie_dans_l_26: No system identified in the axes
auto.cette_vue_identifie_les_system: This view identifies systems that appear both as a
auto.attaquante_selon_les_evenement: attacker according to events. A system in transition indicates advanced compromise or a pivot.
auto.infrastructure_utilise_par_l_a: Infrastructure — used by attacker to pivot
auto.transition_systeme_compromis_u: Transition — compromised system used as pivot
auto.aucun_sommet_commun_detecte_en: No shared vertex detected between diamonds
auto.deux_diamants_doivent_partager: Two diamonds must share the same value on the same axis
auto.deux_diamants_sont_lies_s_ils_: Two diamonds are linked if they share exactly the same value on one axis. A shared vertex can indicate a recurring adversary, reused infrastructure, or a victim targeted multiple times.
auto.ajoutez_d_abord_des_syst_mes_d: First add systems in the Systems tab
auto.ajoutez_d_abord_des_malwares_d: First add malware in the Malware / Tools tab
auto.ajoutez_des_evenements_dans_la: Add events to the investigation Timeline
auto.ajustez_pour_identifier_le_fus: Adjust to identify the probable timezone of the attacker
auto.ajoutez_des_evenements_avec_un: Add events with a source and remote system in the Timeline
auto.aucun_evenement_ne_correspond_: No event matches the selected filters
auto.distribution_24h: Distribution of events over 24h — identification of the attacker's activity time slots
auto.activite_par_jour: Activity by day of the week
auto.distribution_par_jour: Distribution of events by day — identification of preferred activity days

report.author: Team Leader
report.no_tasks_period: No active tasks in this period

actions.stix_object_deleted_with_changes: {{user}} removed a STIX element from the case

actions.stix_relationship_updated_with_changes: {{user}} modified the link between two STIX elements
actions.stix_relationship_deleted: {{user}} removed a link between two STIX elements
actions.stix_relationship_deleted_with_changes: {{user}} removed a link between two STIX elements
